markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the Brex growth strategy and presentation for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Problem:** Brex's current page count (\~1,200) is a severe growth bottleneck. Competitors like Wise.com (243k pages) and Canva (43k pages) prove massive scale is required for significant organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**The Solution:** A programmatic "Index of Indexes" strategy to rapidly scale page count. This creates a new content lane that bypasses Brex's strict, manual review process, which is the primary blocker to high-volume output.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [**The Pitch:** Frame the choice for Brex as a math problem: either accept slow growth or adopt a new strategy that enables the necessary page volume. The presentation will include a prototype and competitor analysis to make this case.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

## Topics

### Brex's Growth Bottleneck

  - [Brex's current page count (\~1,200) is a critical growth constraint, reflecting a "trigger-shy" approach to content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Competitor Benchmarks:**](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Wise.com: 243,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Canva: 43,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [A new site (fintool.com) built 11,000 pages with minimal authority, demonstrating the potential.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Growth Math:** To double traffic, Brex must at least double its surface area (to \~2,400 pages). This is a conservative estimate, as new pages will likely be less effective than existing, optimized ones.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

### Proposed Strategy: "Index of Indexes"

  - [A programmatic approach to build a massive knowledge graph, inspired by sites like Kaggle.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Main Index:** A grid of cards, each representing a specific index (e.g., "Fortune 500 CFOs").](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Sub-Index Page:** A detailed page for each index, featuring an embedded, filterable table.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Profile Page:** A rich profile for each entry, with structured data (stage, location, team size) and cross-links.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Content Hubs:** The system will be built on a "hub-and-spoke" model, tagging every page across multiple hubs (e.g., Role, Topic, Tool) to create a dense, interconnected knowledge graph.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Presentation Plan & Prototype

  - [**Prototype:** A visual prototype of the "Index of Indexes" will be built for the Tuesday meeting to make the strategy tangible.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Pitch Narrative:**](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
      - [**The Problem:** Brex's current page count is insufficient for its growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
      - [**The Math:** To double traffic, Brex needs to triple its page count (to \~3,600) to account for the lower effectiveness of new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
      - [**The Solution:** A programmatic content lane (Indexes) that bypasses the manual review bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**The Experiment:** Start with 3–4 index clusters, scale the 1–2 that perform best, and kill the rest. This de-risks the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**The Precedent:** The Check That project proves this model works, generating traffic for a site with no authority.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
      - [Update the strategy document to incorporate the "Index of Indexes" concept and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
      - [Build a prototype of the "Index of Indexes" for the Tuesday meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Marcel & George:**](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
      - [Meet for one hour on Monday to finalize the prototype and presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/C8e7PQ8iysG3psg3xX3qrviviw962jaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
